title: City of Ottawa Receives Zero Emission Vehicle Infrastructure Program Funding
content: A recent $600,000 investment from Natural Resources Canadaâ€™s Zero Emission Vehicle Infrastructure Program (ZEVIP) is helping power Ottawaâ€™s green future by supporting the installation of EV charging infrastructure. With this funding, the City will install a total of 59 EV charging stations across Ottawa to support the greening of the municipal fleet. The first project to benefit from this funding will be the EV charging hub at the Mary Pitt Centre, where 12 Level 2 and one Level 3 charging stations will be installed by the end of the year. An additional 12 chargers will be installed next year.
author: Analysts Account
